export-dotenv.script:
mkdir -p reports out
cat > reports/runtime.env <<EOF
APP_VERSION=1.2.3
APP_CHANNEL=nightly
DEPLOY_REGION=ap-southeast-1
EOF
cp reports/runtime.env out/runtime.env

consume-dotenv.script:
mkdir -p reports out
echo "APP_VERSION=$APP_VERSION"
echo "APP_CHANNEL=$APP_CHANNEL"
echo "DEPLOY_REGION=$DEPLOY_REGION"
test -n "$APP_VERSION"
test -n "$DEPLOY_REGION"
cat > out/consume.env <<EOF
APP_VERSION=$APP_VERSION
APP_CHANNEL=$APP_CHANNEL
DEPLOY_REGION=$DEPLOY_REGION
EOF
